See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 25821 => 'Maputo', 25823 => 'Beira', 25824 => 'Quelimane', 258251 => 'Manica', 258252 => 'Tete', 25826 => 'Nampula', 258271 => 'Lichinga', 258272 => 'Pemba', 258281 => 'Chokwe', 258282 => 'Xai-Xai', 25829 => 'Inhambane', ];
